title: Particle Blocker
description: Block/Remove particles of your choice with an intuitive gui and enjoy a less clustered, more optimized experience.
body: # Particle Blocker A simple yet useful mod that lets you pick and choose particles to not render. It adds a new particle gui screen with access in video settings. ### Info ⚠️This is a **Fabric** only mod and there are no plans to make a forge version. When using Sodium, download [reeses sodium options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) to access the menu in video settings!!! ### Gui Example:
